conflict_description: User can both create and approve supplier payments
User can create payables and modify vendor master data
User can administer cloud identities and manage billing
User can request and approve own changes
User can post and review general ledger entries
ERP admin can also post financial entries
User can administer HR records and view payroll
Admin also operates as standard sales user
Payroll admin can access financial reports
Identity admin also has infrastructure power-user rights
